output.sparql:
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?state ?stateLabel ?growthRate WHERE {
  ?state wdt:P31 wd:Q12443800 .
  ?state rdfs:label ?stateLabel
  FILTER(LANG(?stateLabel) = "en")
  .
  ?state p:P1082 ?statement2011 .
  ?statement2011 ps:P1082 ?pop2011 ; pq:P585 ?time2011 .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?time2011) , "+2011-"))
  .
  ?state p:P1082 ?statement2001 .
  ?statement2001 ps:P1082 ?pop2001 ; pq:P585 ?time2001 .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?time2001) , "+2001-"))
  .
  BIND(xsd:float(?pop2011) AS ?pop11)
  BIND(xsd:float(?pop2001) AS ?pop01)
  BIND((?pop11 - ?pop01) / ?pop01 AS ?growthRate)
  FILTER ISNUMERIC(?growthRate)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?growthRate)
LIMIT 1
